title: tomophyllum polytrichum
intro: Tomophyllum polytrichum, also known as the fern ally, is a type of tropical plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tomophyllum polytrichum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
